---
id: app-list
title: "Get list of the apps"
description: "List all the apps available for the authenticated account, including those that are owned by other users or Organizations."

  children={"Get list of the apps"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/apps"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List all the apps available for the authenticated account, including those that are owned by other users or Organizations.
